preview_text:
The statistical model favors Senegal to win at 62%, with Iraq's victory probability at 11%. Senegal enters as a clear favorite, though the 51-percentage-point gap reflects a competitive match rather than a foregone conclusion.

The draw carries material weight at 26%, making this a three-way contest with realistic outcomes across all results. Senegal's lead is substantial but not overwhelming; Iraq's 11% win chance and the high draw likelihood suggest the match will remain competitive throughout, particularly if the underdog can contain early pressure.

Model and sportsbook consensus are tightly aligned across all three outcomes, with gaps of 1 percentage point on the Senegal win and under 4 percentage points on both alternative results. This convergence indicates broad agreement on the fixture's probable shape. Polymarket data is not yet available.
